pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly sets DATA_FILE to this path and downloads the image there.
setup_task.sh downloads from raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif. Rasterio tags confirm the image is LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR.
task.json description explicitly requires this output path, although verifier.py searches for any .dim file.
task.json description explicitly requires this output path, although export_result.sh searches for any png/jpg/jpeg > 1024 bytes.
task.json description explicitly requires this output path, although export_result.sh searches for any txt/csv containing regression keywords.
verifier.py checks for these exact string components to award maximum points for the NDVI band computation.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real multi-band Landsat 7 GeoTIFF downloaded from the opengeos dataset repository. The source path, setup logic, and exact expression components ('band_2', 'band_3', '-', '+', '/') required by the verifier perfectly match the metadata. While the verifier is permissive and accepts any output file paths containing the correct content, the task instructions explicitly request the specific export paths defined in the metadata.
